body_txt: A kid-friendlier version of the Sleazy Politician , where the main purpose of elected officials is to bore the audience half to death with grand-sounding, but empty rhetoric. Frequently involves malapropers , apologies for their lack of expertise in speaking , and (broken) promises of being short and to the point. Subtrope of The Bore . Sister trope of Old Windbag and Boring Religious Service . Compare Character Filibuster . Often a popular trait of The Generalissimo and the Pompous Political Pundit .
